section2.headline: That’s Where We Come In.
section2.introText:
You’re ready to make the move—from summer renter to homeowner.
From “Where are we staying this year?” to “Let’s head to our place.”

But finding your perfect second home can feel like a full-time job.
Listings go fast. Information is vague. And most agents don’t actually
know Fire Island.

text1.title: fire island is our specialty
text1.description:
At Luxury Fire Island Homes, we specialize in helping
buyers like you make smart, strategic second-home
purchases on the island. Whether you’re looking for low-
maintenance or legacy-worthy, we’ll help you find the
place that fits your family and your lifestyle.

text2.title: Why Our Buyers Become Lifers
text2.description:
We don’t just want you to close—we want you to walk
away saying, "That was the easiest, most fun experience
I’ve ever had... and honestly, I can’t wait to see [insert
agent’s name] again on the island."

That’s the energy we’re going for.

So yes—we’ve packed in more value, support, peace of
mind (and jokes) than anyone else on Fire Island.

You'll love us so much, we’ll probably end up in your
iPhone favourites (just below your dog walker and your go-
to wine shop).

text1.title: WE BELIEVE IN...
text1.description:
X No drama. 
X No guesswork. 

Just a smooth path to your forever summer —and smart
savings along the way. Because yes, we’ve partnered with
a lender who can get you the best rates and perks—so
you can spend less on closing costs and more on a better
beach cruiser.

cards.hoverText: Even dream homes come with surprises. This covers you for the “just in case” moments, so you can breathe easy post-closing.

cards.mainText: Early Access to Homes Before they hit the market
We’ll Rent Your Home & Make You Money
Your Wallet Deserves a Vacation Too

section3.headline: Here’s what you get:
section3.bottomline: We want you in your dream home, without draining your vacation fund.

section4.headline: This Isn’t Just a Beach House. It’s a Home Base.
section4.bottomline: You’re in good hands. Sunscreen strongly encouraged.
section4.description:
It’s ferry rides. Bare feet. Your kids running ahead of you. The bottle of rosé you keep stocked in the fridge. A place where friends visit once—and ask to come back every year. We’re not here to just help you buy a house. We’re here to help you build your Fire Island life. And you don’t have to take our word for it.

With 100+ five-star reviews and the title of highest-rated real estate company on the island, we’ve helped more families than anyone else—and we’d be honored to help you too. 

You’re in good hands. Sunscreen strongly encouraged.

section7.note: This lifestyle is highly contagious. Symptoms may spread to friends, family, and in-laws—especially after one weekend visit.

cards.description: Side effects include long walks on the beach with iced coffee, zero Sunday scaries, and an overall "I live here now" energy.
You will become the designated beach weekend destination. They’ll say “we’re just crashing for one night.” They’ll stay three.
Somehow, it just tastes better on your own deck. Especially at sunset. Especially barefoot.
Once you try one, it’s over for regular plumbing.
Your pup might start believing they actually own the place.

section7.headline: Beware of your risks!
section7.introText: Potential Side Effects of Owning a Fire Island Beach Home
